special offer
Balance of Powers Elder Totem

Once in a while, the units casts improved restoration upon 3 allied units with the Lowest current health. It removes 1 random negative effects from the targets, and they restore 20% health. All their stats are increased by 25% for 3 sec. The unit also casts improved withering on 3 enemy units with the lowest current health. It removes 1 random positive effects from them, and reduces all their stats by 25% for 3 sec. These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 20% of their maximum health.

- Level 20
Once in a while, the units casts improved restoration upon 3 allied units with the Lowest current health. It removes 2 random negative effects from the targets, and they restore 30% health. All their stats are increased by 30% for 4 sec. The unit also casts improved withering on 3 enemy units with the lowest current health. It removes 2 random positive effects from them, and reduces all their stats by 30% for 4 sec. These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 30% of their maximum health.

- Level 40
Once in a while, the units casts improved restoration upon 3 allied units with the lowest current health. It removes 3 random negative effects from the targets, and they restore 40% health. All their stats are increased by 35% for 5 sec. The unit also casts improved withering on 3 enemy units with the lowest current health. It removes 3 random positive effects from them, and reduces all their stats by 35% for 5 sec. These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 40% of their maximum health.

Requirements: 90
